steps.name: unity-project-readiness-validation
steps.last_known_state: Unity MCP is callable and confirmed the active scene and Build Settings still point only to Assets/Scenes/SampleScene.unity. Required playable scene roots, project-owned prefabs, ScriptableObjects, and runtime script folders are not yet present.
steps.next_action: Open the next Harness implementation unit for the Stage1 scene skeleton and project folder/runtime bootstrap setup.

decision_log.decision: User instructed Codex to proceed according to the Harness after completing resource inventory.
Used Unity MCP for native Unity validation before starting C#, scene, prefab, or ScriptableObject implementation.
Recorded SampleScene-only state as a readiness finding, not as a completed playable scene.

steps.resume_prompt: Read phases/1-unity-project-validation/step0.md, then open the next Harness unit for Stage1 scene skeleton or project bootstrap setup.
